description: In src/lib/orbital/fly-physics.ts, the function heliocentricSpeed(rAu, aTransferAu) returns NaN when rAu is beyond the transfer orbit's apohelion (i.e. the vis-viva radicand 2/rAu - 1/aTransferAu goes negative). Fix heliocentricSpeed so that: at rAu beyond apohelion it falls back to the local circular speed sqrt(mu/rAu); and at rAu=0 it returns 0 instead of NaN. Do not modify the separate visViva() helper in src/lib/orbital.ts — the target is heliocentricSpeed in fly-physics.ts, which the tests exercise.
